description:
Verification capstone for the hard-blockers epic. Depends on B1+B2+B3.

- Run `mix hex.publish --dry-run` and confirm it passes with no refusals/warnings about missing metadata.
- Confirm the public GitHub repo (autom8things/mutagen_ex) exists and the v0.1.0 tag/release referenced by CHANGELOG footer links resolves.

Acceptance: dry-run is clean; links in package metadata resolve.

comments.text:
CAPSTONE VERIFICATION (orchestrator, run directly — read-only checks, no code authored)

Part A — `mix hex.publish --dry-run` / metadata validation: PASS
- `mix hex.build` exits clean. Package builds; checksum computed.
- Metadata complete with NO missing-metadata refusals/warnings:
  - Version: 0.1.0
  - Description: "Mutation testing for Elixir — mutates a scope, runs cited tests per mutant, emits a JSON kill/survive report."
  - Licenses: MIT
  - Links: GitHub => https://github.com/autom8things/mutagen_ex
  - Elixir: ~> 1.19, Build tools: mix, make
- All three hard-blocker children landed on epic/y8o: c7f4a01 (LICENSE+licenses), f42a4ca (description+package metadata), 918bc37 (ex_doc+docs).
- `mix hex.publish --dry-run` proceeds through the same metadata preview, then stops at hex authentication — a credential step, not a metadata blocker.

Part B — GitHub repo + v0.1.0 tag resolve: BLOCKED (human action required)
- No git remote is configured in the epic worktree (`git remote -v` empty).
- `gh repo view autom8things/mutagen_ex` => "Could not resolve to a Repository" — the public repo does not exist yet.
- No v0.1.0 tag exists (locally or remotely). CHANGELOG footer link
  `https://github.com/autom8things/mutagen_ex/releases/tag/v0.1.0` will 404 until the repo + tag are created.

ESCALATED: The code/metadata half of this epic is complete and verified. Full closure of this capstone requires two outward-facing HUMAN actions the orchestrator does not perform (deliberate ship checkpoints):
  1. Create the public GitHub repo autom8things/mutagen_ex, add it as a remote, push epic/y8o, and create the v0.1.0 tag/release.
  2. Authenticate to hex (`mix hex.user auth`) and run the real `mix hex.publish`.
Leaving this ticket OPEN pending those human actions. Note: the package `files:` whitelist (bench fixtures / helper scripts currently bundled) is intentionally deferred to the hygiene epic (mutagen-hcs), not a blocker for this epic.

title: Capstone: mix hex.publish --dry-run green + confirm GitHub repo/tag
